title: Youtube Poop - Gwonam breaks down due to Link's boredom
description:
As usual, Link is bored. Good king Harkinian tries to entertain him by singing a few songs, but fails.
He asks Gwonam for help. But, old Gwonam starts to malfunction because of the epic amount of boredom.

This leads the king to try to stop Gwonam, who attempts to escape with Link on his carpet. They both crash, while the King and Zelda burst into laughter.



This is my first ''real'' youtube poop ; damn, it's freaking hard to be original.

At least I tried.

Oh, and the two songs the king sings are fairly easy to recognize....I'll let you guess.
